data.name: CheckUpdatesOnStartup
data.value: Обнаружение обновлений при запуске программного обеспечения

data.name: CheckUpdatesOnStartupDescription
data.value: Автоматически проверяет наличие обновлений при запуске приложения.

data.name: CurrentVersionIsUpToDate
data.value: Текущая версия уже является последней версией

data.name: RollbackRequiresUninstallThenInstallOrRerunPackage
data.value: Чтобы откатить программное обеспечение, вам необходимо сначала удалить его, а затем переустановить, или переустановить пакет после установки.

data.name: TerminateUnresponsiveProcess
data.value: Завершить процессы, не отвечающие на запросы.

data.name: ClickYesToUpdateNow
data.value: Нажмите «Да», чтобы обновить немедленно, нажмите «Нет», чтобы пропустить эту версию, или нажмите «Отмена», чтобы напомнить мне позже.

data.name: UpdatePreviewCheckingSummary
data.value: Получение сведений о последних версиях основного приложения, плагинов и тем. Пожалуйста, подождите.

data.name: UpdatePreviewNoUpdatesMessage
data.value: Основное приложение, плагины и темы уже обновлены.

data.name: UpdatePreviewPackageDownloadFailed
data.value: Не удалось загрузить пакет обновления. Повторите попытку позже.

data.name: UpdatePreviewPluginDownloadFailed
data.value: Загрузка плагина завершилась неуспешно. Повторите попытку позже.

data.name: UpdatePreviewCombinedPackageIncomplete
data.value: Пакеты комбинированного обновления загружены не полностью. Повторите попытку позже.

data.name: UpdatePreviewDialogSummaryNoUpdates
data.value: Основное приложение, плагины и темы уже обновлены.

data.name: UpdatePreviewApplicationCardSummaryFull
data.value: Будет загружен полный установщик и использован текущий процесс обновления приложения.

data.name: UpdatePreviewSelectionRestartRequired
data.value: После завершения обновления приложение будет перезапущено

data.name: UpdatePreviewSelectionBackupAndRestart
data.value: Перед обновлением автоматически создаётся резервная копия, а после завершения может потребоваться перезапуск

data.name: UpdatePreviewSkippedIncompatibleUpdatesFormat
data.value: Следующие обновления скрыты из-за требований совместимости: {0}

data.name: UpdatePreviewApplicationCardSummaryIncrementalFormat
data.value: В этом цикле будет применено {0} инкрементальных пакетов приложения вместе с выбранными обновлениями.

data.name: UpdatePreviewDialogSummaryDefault
data.value: Доступно {0} обновлений. Выберите нужные и установите их сейчас.

data.name: UpdatePreviewDialogSummarySkippedCount
data.value: Ещё {0} обновлений скрыты из-за требований совместимости.

data.name: UpdatePreviewShowNoUpdatesSkippedMessage
data.value: Нет доступных комбинированных обновлений для выполнения. Следующие плагины были пропущены из-за требований совместимости: {0}

data.name: CopilotRefreshWebContext
data.value: Повторно получить веб-контекст и сгенерировать ответ

data.name: CopilotModelConfigDescription
data.value: Сохраняйте несколько конфигураций моделей; панель AI справа будет использовать этот список моделей напрямую.

data.name: CopilotVendorHint
data.value: Сначала выберите поставщика, затем добавьте; справа можно продолжить изменять совместимость, адрес, модель и системный промпт.

data.name: CopilotSettingsHint
data.value: Поддерживает предустановки поставщиков, моделей и ручной ввод адресов; панель AI может переключать модели перед отправкой.

data.name: DesktopPetTestMessage
data.value: Это тестовое сообщение от рабочего питомца.

data.name: DesktopPetIdleTip1
data.value: I'm here, I'll remind you when there are messages.

data.name: DesktopPetIdleTip2
data.value: Take a break for your eyes, and save your current work.

data.name: DesktopPetIdleTip3
data.value: If you need me to be quiet, right-click to turn off notifications.

data.name: DesktopPetIdleTip4
data.value: If you have a local Live2D model, you can connect it in settings.

data.name: DesktopPetStartupGreeting
data.value: ColorVision has started, I'll be here to remind you.

data.name: DesktopPetLive2DError
data.value: Model loading failed, switched to built-in appearance.

data.name: ConfigLive2DPath
data.value: Путь к модели Live2D или HTML

data.name: PluginLoadFailedPrompt
data.value: The software failed to open last time. Do you want to disable plugins?

data.name: UpdateExecutionIncremental
data.value: Execution: Incremental packages and plugin packages will be downloaded first, then applied in one go.

data.name: UpdateExecutionFull
data.value: Execution: Download the full installer and install using the current application update process.\nPlugins are not included in this automatic update.

data.name: ComRegistrationFailed
data.value: COM registration failed. Please confirm administrator privileges have been granted.

data.name: ThumbnailRegistrationSuccess
data.value: Thumbnail preview registered successfully!\nAfter restarting the file explorer, .cvraw and .cvcie files will display image thumbnails.

data.name: CopilotAiViewNotReady
data.value: The AI view in the main interface is not ready yet.

data.name: CopilotAiNotConfigured
data.value: AI is not configured, cannot directly send exception diagnosis request.

data.name: CopilotSentToAiView
data.value: Sent to the AI view in the main interface.

data.name: CopilotAiGenerating
data.value: AI is generating, exception context has been placed in the input box.

data.name: CopilotContextPlaced
data.value: Exception context has been placed in the AI input box.

data.name: CopilotNoLogFile
data.value: No readable log files found in the current environment.

data.name: CopilotContentTruncated
data.value: ...<Content truncated, only the last {0} characters are retained.>

data.name: CopilotReadTodayLog
data.value: Read today's log: {0}, {2} lines matched keyword {1}.

data.name: CopilotReadRecentLog
data.value: Read recent log: {0}, {2} lines matched keyword {1}.

data.name: CopilotRecentLogSummary
data.value: Read recent log: {0}, showing {2} of the last {1} lines.

data.name: CopilotSelectHistoryOrNew
data.value: Select a history session from the right, or click + to create a new session.

data.name: CopilotConfigureModelFirst
data.value: Click the configuration in the upper right corner to add a model, then start chatting.

data.name: CopilotTokenUsageAfterSend
data.value: Show real token usage after sending

data.name: CopilotLocalEstimateRemoved
data.value: No local estimation is done now, only showing real token usage returned by the API.

data.name: CopilotReusedContext
data.value: Reused context from previous execution, tools were not called again.

data.name: CopilotNoFinalAnswer
data.value: No final answer received, only execution process or reasoning content.

data.name: CopilotNoDisplayText
data.value: API returned success, but no displayable text.

data.name: CopilotTitleGeneratorPrompt
data.value: You are a conversation title generator. Generate a short, natural Chinese title based on the given conversation. Return only the title itself, no explanation.

data.name: CopilotDeleteConversationConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete conversation "{0}"?

data.name: CopilotEnterContextDescription
data.value: Enter context description to attach to the current session

data.name: CopilotEnterWebPageUrl
data.value: Enter web page URL to fetch and attach to the current session

data.name: CopilotWaitingTokenUsage
data.value: Waiting for API to return real token usage...

data.name: CopilotSelectModelFirst
data.value: Please select or configure a model before sending. This panel only shows real token usage returned by the API.

data.name: CopilotNoTokenUsage
data.value: Last request did not return token usage

data.name: CopilotRealUsageNote
data.value: Note: This shows the real token usage from the most recent API request.

data.name: CopilotAgentAccumulated
data.value: Agent mode has accumulated multiple model calls from planner and final answer.

data.name: CopilotCurrentRequestUsage
data.value: Note: Only showing real usage returned by the API. Statistics will refresh after this request completes.

data.name: CopilotLocalEstimateNote
data.value: Note: This panel no longer does local estimation, only showing real usage returned by the API. The last request did not return a usage field, so there are no input/output tokens to display.

data.name: CopilotSendToSeeUsage
data.value: Note: After sending, if the API returns a usage field, this will show real input, output, and total tokens.

data.name: CopilotTitlePrompt
data.value: Generate a short Chinese conversation title for the following conversation.

data.name: CopilotTitleRequirements
data.value: Requirements: 6 to 14 characters, return only the title, no explanation, no quotes, no period.

data.name: CopilotContextInjection
data.value: The following is the additional context mounted in the current session. They are reference information explicitly provided by the user. Please use them as needed when answering:

data.name: CopilotExplicitSnapshot
data.value: The following is an explicit business snapshot attached by the user. It was captured when clicking "Ask Copilot" or manually attaching; answers should prioritize analysis based on these snapshots.

data.name: CopilotFileNotExist
data.value: File does not exist, cannot read.

data.name: CopilotImageNotExist
data.value: Local image attachment does not exist: {0}

data.name: CopilotImagePreviewNote
data.value: The current version displays image preview in the interface, but does not automatically upload pixel content to the model.

data.name: CopilotWebPageContextInstruction
data.value: The following web page content was actually fetched by the local program before sending. You must answer web page questions based only on these fetch results, and must not say you cannot browse the internet; if the fetch failed or the fetched content does not contain relevant information, you must clearly state that you cannot complete the analysis based on real web page content, and cannot assume the web page contains information that was not fetched.

data.name: CopilotWindowContextNote
data.value: The above is only a lightweight summary of the current business window; if the current session also has an explicit snapshot mounted, please prioritize combining that snapshot when answering.

data.name: CopilotNoSearchKeyword
data.value: No searchable keywords in the current exception.

data.name: CopilotGoogleSearchOpened
data.value: Google search results opened in default browser.

data.name: CopilotCanSendToAi
data.value: Can send the current exception and recent logs directly to the AI view in the main interface.

data.name: CopilotCannotAskAi
data.value: AI is not configured or the main interface is not ready, cannot ask directly.

data.name: CopilotInvalidLineCount
data.value: Invalid line count input, restored to {0} lines.

data.name: CopilotDuplicateException
data.value: Detected {0} duplicate exceptions of the same type, merged into the current window.

data.name: CopilotExtraExceptions
data.value: {0} additional exceptions caught in a short time, merged into the current window.

data.name: CopilotDiagnosticPrompt
data.value: Please help me analyze the unhandled exception in the ColorVision WPF client. Based on the exception content and recent logs, provide the most likely cause, priority troubleshooting points, and minimal viable fix direction; if information is insufficient, please clearly indicate what is missing.

data.name: CopilotDocsIndexNotPublished
data.value: Online documentation index not published, please confirm GitHub Pages has completed the latest deployment.

data.name: CopilotDocsIndexFormatError
data.value: Online documentation index format cannot be recognized: {0}

data.name: CopilotDocsIndexEmpty
data.value: Online documentation index is empty, cannot answer software documentation questions at this time.

data.name: CopilotPlannerFallback
data.value: Planner did not return parseable JSON, falling back to default tool selection.

data.name: CopilotPlannerContextSufficient
data.value: Planner determined current context is sufficient.

data.name: CopilotPlannerExecuteTool
data.value: Prioritize executing {0} to obtain missing information.

data.name: CopilotPlannerUnknownTool
data.value: Planner selected unknown tool {0}, falling back to default tool selection.

data.name: CopilotPlannerOutputUnrecognized
data.value: Planner output cannot be recognized, falling back to default tool selection.
